pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Remove exclusions for JUnit 4 and JUnit Vintage engine from spring-boot-starter-test.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x and JUnit 5 are the standard; JUnit 4/Vintage support is often removed or discouraged, and explicit exclusions are no longer needed or desired.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/chouett.general_idea: Remove redundant @Autowired annotation from constructor parameter as constructor injection is the default in Spring Boot.
Use pattern matching for instanceof to simplify exception handling logic.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/chouett.after: throwable -> throwable instanceof WebClientResponseException wcre && wcre.getStatusCode().is5xxServerError();

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/organis.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for retrieving the first element.
Replace deprecated Locale constructor with the new Locale.of factory method introduced in Java 21.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/organis.why_exists: The Locale(String) constructor is deprecated for removal in Java 21; while it may still compile, using the deprecated API is discouraged and future-proofing requires migration to the new factory method.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/organis.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21 for safer list access.
Replace deprecated Swagger 2.x @Api annotation with OpenAPI 3.x @Tag annotation to align with modern API documentation standards.
